title: Project Management
description:
This course features Coursera Coach! 
A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

Unlock the essential skills needed to successfully manage and execute projects from start to finish. This course provides a comprehensive approach to project management, covering everything from risk management to team building. You will gain practical knowledge in managing resources, estimating work, and understanding project life cycles to ensure your projects run smoothly and within budget.

Throughout the course, you'll explore key concepts such as stakeholder management, project planning, and execution strategies. You'll be guided through each phase of a project, including initiation, planning, execution, and closure, giving you hands-on tools for real-world project management. By utilizing models like RACING for responsibility assessments, you'll learn how to keep your projects on track and aligned with strategic goals.

The course is ideal for professionals looking to enhance their project management skills, as well as those who are new to leading projects. Whether you’re managing a team or working independently, this course will provide you with the necessary frameworks to drive successful project outcomes. No prior project management experience is required, but familiarity with business operations can be helpful.

By the end of the course, you will be able to define project goals, plan effectively, track progress, manage risks, and execute projects efficiently, ensuring high-quality results on time and within budget.
